w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

m:r.m:t: 1, jika ada edge antara node i dan node j
0, jika tidak ada edge antara node i dan node j

w:r.w:t: Dalam dunia machine learning dan deep learning, dua

wp:docPr.name: Rectangle 1
wp:docPr.descr: The "Black Box Effect" in Artificial Intelligence

v:rect.alt: The "Black Box Effect" in Artificial Intelligence

w:r.w:t: black box model. Dalam white box model,

wp:docPr.name: Picture 2
wp:docPr.descr: The emergence of a scale free network can be observed when newly added edges show a high tendency of getting attached to existing nodes with a high degree of connectivity (preferential attachment). Note that at each step a new node is added to the preexisting network. The newly attached node prefers to get attached with a node within the network with maximum degree. (courtesy [2][7]).

pic:cNvPr.name: Picture 1
pic:cNvPr.descr: The emergence of a scale free network can be observed when newly added edges show a high tendency of getting attached to existing nodes with a high degree of connectivity (preferential attachment). Note that at each step a new node is added to the preexisting network. The newly attached node prefers to get attached with a node within the network with maximum degree. (courtesy [2][7]).
